summary: Completed comprehensive testing of P1 and P2 features: Check-In & Streaks, Explore page with search, Feed improvements (For You/Following tabs, Shaka reactions), Profile improvements (edit modal, stats). All 18 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified working correctly with all data-testid elements present and functional.
critical_code_review_comments: All P1 and P2 features implemented correctly
Check-in API properly validates 'already checked in today' case
Streak calculation logic handles consecutive days correctly
Explore search returns correct results for spots, users, and posts
Profile edit modal has all required fields with proper data-testid attributes
seed_data_creation: Used existing test accounts, Florida surf spots seeded, live photographer Sarah Waters active
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 and P2 features fully implemented and tested. Test user has 1-day streak and has already checked in today (so check-in button shows 'Checked In'). Sarah Waters is live photographer. Sebastian Inlet is searchable in Explore. All profile edit fields working.

verified_features.check_in_api_works: PASS - POST /api/check-in creates check-in and updates streak
verified_features.explore_trending_returns_data: PASS - GET /api/explore/trending returns live_now, trending_spots, trending_posts
verified_features.feed_for_you_tab_works: PASS - For You tab displays posts from API
verified_features.feed_following_tab_present: PASS - Following tab visible and clickable
verified_features.feed_check_in_button_shows_checked_in: PASS - Shows 'Checked In' with checkmark when user has checked in today
verified_features.explore_popular_spots_grid: PASS - Displays Jacksonville Beach Pier, Atlantic Beach, St. Augustine Beach, Sebastian Inlet
verified_features.profile_stats_row: PASS - Shows Posts, Followers, Following counts
verified_features.profile_credits_card: PASS - Shows '0 Credits' with 'Add More' button
verified_features.profile_edit_button_opens_modal: PASS - Edit Profile button opens modal with all fields
